memoryArtifacts.headline: Gerard de Camville
memoryArtifacts.description:
Gerard de Camville

Gerard de Camville (died around 1215) was an English nobleman, judge, and supporter of King John.

His father was Richard de Camville, a baron and administrator under Kings Stephen …

zh.Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, England, Un: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾利爾布恩

zh.lifeSummary: 當Idoine Camville於大約1205年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布拉特萊比時，她的父親Richard de Camville29歲，母親Eustachia De Basset31歲。她於1216年與William 'the Younger' Longespée結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1251年在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年47歲。

zh-hans.Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, England, Un: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾利爾布恩

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Idoine Camville于大约1205年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布拉特萊比时，她的父亲Richard de Camville29岁，母亲Eustachia De Basset31岁。她于1216年与William 'the Younger' Longespée结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1251年在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When Idoine Camville was born about 1205, in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Camville, was 29 and her mother, Eustachia De Basset, was 31. She married William 'the Younger' Longespée in 1216. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1251, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Idoine Camville est née environ 1205, à Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Camville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eustachia De Basset, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William 'the Younger' Longespée en 1216. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1251, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Idoine Camville um 1205 in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Camville 29 und ihre Mutter Eustachia De Basset 31. Sie hat 1216 William 'the Younger' Longespée geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1251 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Idoine Camville è nata il circa 1205 nel Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Camville, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Eustachia De Basset, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William 'the Younger' Longespée nel 1216. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1251, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Idoine Camvilleが約1205年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブラットレビーで生まれた時，父Richard de Camvilleは29歳，母Eustachia De Bassetは31歳であった。1216年にWilliam 'the Younger' Longespéeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1251年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Idoine Camville(이)가 대략 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 브래틀레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Camville(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eustachia De Basset(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1216년 William 'the Younger' Longespée(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Idoine Camville nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Camville, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eustachia De Basset, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William 'the Younger' Longespée em 1216. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1251, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Idoine Camville родилась около 1205 г. в местности браттлеби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Camville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachia De Basset, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William 'the Younger' Longespée в 1216 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1251 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Idoine Camville nació aproximadamente 1205, en Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Camville, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eustachia De Basset, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William 'the Younger' Longespée en 1216. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1251, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
